scene_input.scene_summary: Marthad, Khālid, and ʿĀṣim are approached by the Hudhayl tribe, who ask them to pledge allegiance.
scene_input.key_visual_action: Hudhayl tribe approaching with outstretched hands

schema_output.scene_summary: Marthad, Khālid, and ʿĀṣim are approached by the Hudhayl tribe, who ask them to pledge allegiance.
schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 186
schema_output.moral_lesson: Importance of loyalty and commitment to one's community

characters.name: Marthad
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a long-sleeved beige thobe and a brown woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering

characters.name: Khālid
characters.appearance: slender build, wearing a short-sleeved white thobe and a plain brown woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering

characters.name: ʿĀṣim
characters.appearance: tall build, wearing a long-sleeved beige thobe and a brown woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering

characters.name: Hudhayl
characters.appearance: group of men in traditional Arabian attire, wearing white thobes and head coverings, with various facial expressions and postures

schema_output.narrative_text: The Hudhayl tribe approached Marthad, Khālid, and ʿĀṣim with outstretched hands, asking them to pledge allegiance.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A vast open plain in the Arabian Desert during the late afternoon, under a vast sky with a few scattered clouds. The sun casts a warm golden light across the scene. In the distance, a group of men in the Hudhayl tribe, dressed in traditional Arabian attire, approach three companions - the central figure Marthad, Khālid, and ʿĀṣim - who stand together, looking out at the approaching tribe. The men in the Hudhayl tribe are seen from behind, with some of them turned towards the companions, their hands outstretched in a gesture of peace and friendship. The companions, Marthad, Khālid, and ʿĀṣim, are seen in profile, wearing traditional Arabian clothing, their faces obscured. Soft warm golden light, tense and suspenseful mood. Medium shot with a slight bird's-eye view. Warm beige, golden, and brown palette with accents of white. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
